User.title: User
User.description: A user of the platform, either a driver or a vehicle owner.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

role.description: The user's role in the platform.

verified.description: Whether the user's documents have been verified by an admin.

verificationStatus.description: The current status of the user's verification.

favorites.description: List of vehicle IDs favorited by the user.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

Vehicle.title: Vehicle
Vehicle.description: A taxi vehicle listed for rental.

id.description: The unique identifier for the vehicle.

ownerId.description: The UID of the owner who listed the vehicle.

model.description: The model and make of the vehicle.

type.description: The type of vehicle (e.g., Sedan, SUV).

location.description: The general location of the vehicle.

availability.description: Whether the vehicle is currently available for booking.

images.description: List of image URLs for the vehicle.

Booking.title: Booking
Booking.description: A rental agreement between a driver and an owner.

id.description: The unique identifier for the booking.

vehicleId.description: The ID of the vehicle being booked.

driverId.description: The UID of the driver making the booking.

ownerId.description: The UID of the vehicle owner.

startDate.description: The start date of the rental.

endDate.description: The end date of the rental.

status.description: The current status of the booking.

totalAmount.description: The total amount for the rental.

ownerStartReminderSent.description: Whether the start reminder has been sent to the owner.

driverStartReminderSent.description: Whether the start reminder has been sent to the driver.

ownerEndReminderSent.description: Whether the end reminder has been sent to the owner.

driverEndReminderSent.description: Whether the end reminder has been sent to the driver.

createdAt.description: When the booking request was made.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: A rating and feedback given by a user.

id.description: The unique identifier for the review.

fromId.description: The UID of the user giving the review.

toId.description: The UID of the user receiving the review.

bookingId.description: The ID of the associated booking.

DriverLocation.title: DriverLocation
DriverLocation.description: Real-time GPS location of a driver.

lastUpdated.description: When the location was last updated.
